reasons: Atlas can pull multiple enemies into one area, giving Nana a strong target for Molina Blitz.
Nana can layer slow, stun, and magic burst after Atlas starts the teamfight.

proof.summary: Atlas groups enemies with hard engage, and Nana follows with AoE magic damage plus crowd-control layering.
worksBestWhen: Nana is in range to cast after the pull.
The team has damage ready during the follow-up control.
failureCases: Atlas engages before Nana is in range.
Enemies cleanse or disengage after the pull.
Nana is caught before she can cast.

reasons: Tigreal can pull and stun enemies, giving Nana a stable area for Molina Blitz follow-up.
Nana adds secondary control after Tigreal's engage to extend the punishment window.

proof.summary: Tigreal starts the grouped crowd-control window, and Nana layers Molina Blitz plus Molina Smooch pressure into the same area.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal catches two or more enemies.
Nana waits for Tigreal's control before casting ultimate.
Nana stays backline-safe while following up.
failureCases: Tigreal's engage misses or is interrupted.
Enemies spread before Nana's follow-up lands.
Enemy cleanse or anti-CC reduces the chain value.

reasons: Franco can pull a target that Nana has slowed or transformed.
Nana can prepare Molina around Franco's catch zone to extend the pickoff chain.

proof.summary: Nana limits a target's movement with Molina, and Franco converts that control into a hook or suppression pickoff.
worksBestWhen: Nana places Molina near the target's movement path.
Franco waits for the slow or transform before hooking.
The team collapses on the pulled target.
failureCases: Hook is blocked by a tank.
Franco pulls the target away from Nana's follow-up damage.

reasons: Saber can burst a target that Nana has transformed or slowed.
Nana's control gives Saber a clearer single-target entry window.

proof.summary: Nana sets the target with movement control, and Saber follows with Triple Sweep to finish the pick.
worksBestWhen: Nana's control lands on a fragile priority target.
Saber waits for the setup before entering.
failureCases: Nana controls a tank or low-value target.
Saber enters after the control ends.
Enemy peel reaches Saber during the dive.

reasons: Nana's Molina Smooch can reduce the target's magic defense, supporting Gusion's magic burst follow-up.
The slow or transform effect can make Gusion's dagger combo easier to connect.

proof.summary: Nana weakens and controls the target with Molina Smooch, while Gusion follows with magic burst during the setup window.
worksBestWhen: Nana lands Molina Smooch on the priority target.
Gusion has full combo cooldowns ready.
The target is fragile enough for burst conversion.
failureCases: The target cleanses or escapes before the combo connects.
Enemy frontline shields or peels the target.
